title: CID Not Satisfied With Abhishek Banerjee's Answers? Sources Claim Inconsistencies Found
description: | A major political controversy has erupted in West Bengal after sources claimed that investigators were not fully satisfied with the responses provided by TMC leader Abhishek Banerjee during hours-long questioning in the alleged signature forgery case.According to sources, investigators are examining multiple aspects of the case and have reportedly identified inconsistencies that may require further scrutiny. The questioning is being seen as a significant development in a case that has already
